text_raw: You have no idea what's coming for you.
text_clean: You have no idea what's coming for you.

text_raw: I'll carry this humiliation to my grave!
text_clean: I'll carry this humiliation to my grave!

text_raw: I'll grind you into the earth!
text_clean: I'll grind you into the earth!

text_raw: You really think you stand a chance with such feeble skills?

text_raw: I'll break every bone in your body and throw you to the hounds.
text_clean: I'll break every bone in your body and throw you to the hounds.

text_raw: I'll see you crawling and begging for mercy!
